questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: What does the notice on the train tell passengers?

options.label: They must keep quiet in this part of the train.
They cannot eat or drink on the train.
They have to turn off their phones.

questions.explanation: Thông báo cho biết đây là toa yên tĩnh, xin đừng dùng điện thoại.

questions.prompt: What is Dad doing?

options.label: He is asking his child to go shopping.
He is offering to buy something for his child.
He is telling his child when he will be home.

questions.explanation: Bố nói sẽ về nhà lúc 6 giờ.

questions.prompt: What is true about the Summer Festival?

options.label: It is free for children under 12.

questions.explanation: Trẻ em dưới 12 tuổi được vào cửa miễn phí.

questions.prompt: Why did Sarah write to John?

options.label: To ask him where her book is.
To remind him about the test.

questions.explanation: Sarah hỏi John có thấy cuốn sách lịch sử của cô ấy không.

questions.prompt: What is the problem at the swimming pool?

options.label: It will be closed for one day.

questions.explanation: Hồ bơi đóng cửa bảo trì hôm nay và mở lại vào ngày mai lúc 8h.

questions.prompt: What is Emma's message about?

options.label: She asks Tom to pick her up from the gym.
She invites Tom to go to the gym with her.
She wants to know if Tom works today.

questions.explanation: Emma rủ Tom đi tập gym cùng cô ấy.

passage.label: Olivia
passage.text: When I want to relax, I go to the park near my house. I love to sit on a bench and read a book. I like the sounds of birds singing and the fresh air. Sometimes I just watch people walking their dogs. I find it very peaceful.

passage.label: Jack
passage.text: My favourite place to relax is my bedroom. I love playing video games with my friends online. We talk and laugh while we play. It's a great way to forget about school and homework. I don't feel lonely because my friends are just a click away.

passage.label: Mia
passage.text: I really enjoy going to a small café near the city centre. I go there with my best friend, Lucy. We order hot chocolate and talk about everything. The café has a warm and friendly atmosphere. It's the perfect place to unwind after a busy week.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: Who likes to be outdoors to relax?
questions.explanation: Olivia thích ở công viên ngoài trời.

questions.prompt: Who relaxes by playing games?
questions.explanation: Jack chơi game điện tử để thư giãn.

questions.prompt: Who goes to a café to relax?
questions.explanation: Mia thích đến quán cà phê với bạn thân.

questions.prompt: Who enjoys the sounds of nature?
questions.explanation: Olivia thích tiếng chim hót và không khí trong lành.

questions.prompt: Who does not feel alone because of technology?
questions.explanation: Jack nói bạn bè online giúp anh ấy không cô đơn.

questions.prompt: Who relaxes with a friend in person?
questions.explanation: Mia đi cùng Lucy (bạn thân) đến quán cà phê.

questions.prompt: Who describes a place with a warm atmosphere?
questions.explanation: Mia miêu tả quán cà phê có bầu không khí ấm áp và thân thiện.

parts.passageSubtitle: How a dolphin helps local fishermen.

passage.text: In a small town on the coast of Brazil, there is a dolphin called Fin. Fin is famous because he helps local fishermen catch fish. This has been happening for over a decade.
Fin works together with the fishermen in a special way. When he sees fish near the shore, he makes a special noise or jumps out of the water. This tells the fishermen where to throw their nets.
The fishermen trust Fin completely. They know that if he signals, there will be a good catch. In return, they always give some of their fish to Fin. It's a fair exchange.
Scientists are interested in Fin's behaviour. They want to understand how he learned to do this. Some say he learned it from his mother, who also helped fishermen many years ago.
The town is proud of Fin. He has become a tourist attraction. Many people come to see him work. The fishermen say he has made their lives easier and more profitable.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: What is Fin famous for?

options.label: He is the largest dolphin in the area.

questions.explanation: Fin nổi tiếng vì giúp ngư dân bắt cá.

questions.prompt: How does Fin communicate with the fishermen?

options.label: He brings fish to the shore.

questions.explanation: Fin tạo ra tiếng động đặc biệt hoặc nhảy lên khỏi mặt nước.

questions.prompt: What do the fishermen give Fin in return for his help?

options.label: Some of the fish they catch.

questions.explanation: Họ luôn đưa một phần cá cho Fin.

questions.prompt: What do scientists believe about Fin's behaviour?

options.label: He learned it from another dolphin.

questions.explanation: Các nhà khoa học cho rằng Fin học được từ mẹ mình.

questions.prompt: How has Fin affected the town?

options.label: He is a popular tourist sight.

questions.explanation: Fin đã trở thành điểm thu hút khách du lịch.

passage.text: Marie Curie is one of the most famous scientists in history. She was (19) ________ in Poland in 1867. She moved to Paris to study physics and mathematics. At that time, it was very difficult for a woman to (20) ________ a university education.
Marie met her husband, Pierre Curie, at work. They (21) ________ together on a new element called radium. Their research was very (22) ________ and helped to develop the science of radioactivity.

Marie Curie won the Nobel Prize twice – once in physics and once in chemistry. She worked (23) ________ her life, even after her husband died. She died in 1934 because of radiation exposure, but her (24) ________ still inspire scientists today.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: She was (19) ________ in Poland in 1867.
questions.explanation: Marie Curie sinh ra (born) ở Ba Lan.

questions.prompt: At that time, it was very difficult for a woman to (20) ________ a university education.
questions.explanation: get an education = nhận được nền giáo dục.

questions.prompt: They (21) ________ together on a new element called radium.
questions.explanation: worked together = làm việc cùng nhau.

questions.prompt: Their research was very (22) ________ and helped to develop the science of radioactivity.
questions.explanation: Nghiên cứu rất quan trọng (important).

questions.prompt: She worked (23) ________ her life, even after her husband died.
questions.explanation: worked all her life = cống hiến cả cuộc đời.

questions.prompt: ... but her (24) ________ still inspire scientists today.
questions.explanation: Những khám phá (discoveries) của bà vẫn truyền cảm hứng.

passage.text:
Hi Mum,
We're going on a school trip to the museum next Friday. We have to be at school (0) ________ 8 am. The bus leaves at 8:15.
I need to bring a packed lunch (25) ________ I don't like the food in the museum café. Could you also give (26) ________ some money for the gift shop? I'll be (27) ________ about 5 pm.

We (28) ________ to see some dinosaur bones. I'm (29) ________ excited because I love history. Write (30) ________ as soon as you get this! I need to know if you can give me a lift in the morning.

Love,
Tom

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, write the correct answer. Write ONE word for each gap.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: because = bởi vì (lý do mang đồ ăn trưa).

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: give me some money = cho tôi ít tiền.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: be home about 5 pm = về nhà khoảng 5 giờ chiều.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: We are going to see = chúng con sẽ xem.

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: so excited = rất háo hức (mức độ cao).

questions.prompt: Write ONE word.
questions.explanation: Write back = viết thư trả lời.
